title: Ensure setUp() and tearDown() methods are correctly annotated when migrating from JUnit3 to JUnit4 or JUnit5
description: The setUp() and tearDown() methods need to be correctly annotated with the equivalent annotation in order to preserve the same behavior when migrating from JUnit3 to JUnit4 or JUnit5.
recommendation: Annotate setUp() and tearDown() methods with the equivalent annotation for JUnit4 or JUnit5
impact: Preserves the same behavior when migrating from JUnit3 to JUnit4 or JUnit5

checks.message: Annotate setUp() and tearDown() methods with the equivalent annotation for JUnit4 or JUnit5
